title: Add an item through the calendar view in the mobile app
excerpt: It’d be super helpful if the calendar view on the mobile app was updated so you can add an item by viewing the calendar.  This will particularly benefit any sales teams in the field using the mobile app - so they can use…

posts.author: Kspringsteen (Kara)
posts.cookedHtml: It’d be super helpful if the calendar view on the mobile app was updated so you can add an item by viewing the calendar. This will particularly benefit any sales teams in the field using the mobile app - so they can use the calendar as their home view and add a meeting or future meeting to their Monday calendar.

posts.author: juliap (Julia)
posts.cookedHtml: Definitely agree with this - our team will be using the mobile app 85% of the time and this feature would be very beneficial!
